codeReview.summary: The commit introduces the shared core.idempotency package and migrates the six targeted services to consume parts of it, but the feature does not satisfy the stated expectedBehavior/validation contract requirement that copy-pasted idempotency helpers be eliminated codebase-wide. Blocking duplicate helpers remain in module services outside core.idempotency.

issues.description: SalesReturnService still keeps local idempotency helper implementations (`normalizeToken` at line 651 and `sha256Hex` at line 665) for return-key hashing. This violates VAL-FOUND-002 / expectedBehavior requiring no duplicated normalizeToken/sha256Hex helpers outside the shared core.idempotency framework.

ProductionCatalogService still defines a local `sha256Hex` helper (`sha256Hex(MultipartFile file)`), so repository-wide sha256 hashing helpers are not centralized to core.idempotency as required by the feature verification criteria.

The new generic `reserve(...)` API is introduced but has no callers in `src/main/java` at this commit; modules still use per-service reservation/retry code paths. This limits deduplication of reservation/replay flow compared with the feature intent.

sharedStateObservations.observation: `backend-worker` verification guidance conflicts with mission guidance: the skill mandates `mvn test -Djacoco.skip=true -T4`, while AGENTS.md explicitly forbids `mvn test -T4` and directs workers to gate-fast + unit suites. This mismatch can cause workers to follow outdated validation steps.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/backend-worker/SKILL.md:51 requires `mvn test -Djacoco.skip=true -T4`; mission AGENTS.md:56-63 defines baseline `mvn test -Pgate-fast -Djacoco.skip=true` and states `DO NOT run: mvn test -T4`.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Shared idempotency service is annotated with `@Service` but repeatedly instantiated manually with `new` in module services; if constructor injection is the intended Spring convention, that rule is not documented clearly in shared guidance.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: `IdempotencyReservationService` is a Spring bean at core/idempotency/IdempotencyReservationService.java:15-16, but modules construct it directly (e.g., SalesService.java:174, PurchasingService.java:90, AccountingService.java:132 in commit a687a068).

summary: Fail: blocking gaps remain against the feature's own expectedBehavior/VAL-FOUND-002 centralization requirement because duplicate idempotency helper methods still exist outside core.idempotency.
